name: SparkChart
visual_summary: 2D chart component to visualize data with area fill effects and color customization. Use when displaying trends or data distribution over time.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: SparkChart
Description: 2D chart component to visualize data with area fill effects and color customization. Use when displaying trends or data distribution over time.
Style: minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: animated
Tags: chart, spark, 2d, fill, color, visualize, trellis

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
